egfr_driven_generic_cancer.description: Small generic cancer-cell twin with elevated EGFR signaling and partial PTEN loss.

stress_challenge.description: Same oncogenic background under stronger DNA damage signaling.

controlled_state.description: Less oncogenic comparison state with lower EGFR signaling and preserved PTEN.

hcc827_parental.description: Real-world inspired EGFR-mutant NSCLC use case based on HCC827 parental cells with exon 19 deleted EGFR and low MET bypass signaling.

hcc827_gr_met_resistant.description: Real-world inspired resistant state based on HCC827 gefitinib-resistant cells with MET-driven ERBB3-PI3K bypass signaling.
